Build the 3-tier pricing block (Audit, Sprint, Retainer)[cite: 12]
Insert today's demo as the proof element[cite: 12]
Save it as a reusable template[cite: 12]

Prepare what you're actually sending (description, screen recording, 2-3 specific questions)[cite: 12]
Log who you sent it to and when[cite: 12]

Write Tomorrow's Single MIT Before Shutdown[cite: 12]

Don't send the proposal template to a real prospect today[cite: 12]
Don't pick 3 random people just to check the box[cite: 12]
Don't start Phase 5's agent frameworks or LangChain[cite: 12]

action_plan.title: Day #8 — Saturday, July 11, 2026 | Career Strategy OS[cite: 17]
recap_and_carried_forward: 3 days running — automation build interrupted by setup tasks (Day 5, Day 6, Day 7)[cite: 17]
3 remaining — outreach messages unsent since Day 5[cite: 17]
anchors: Fajr: Protected, no phone before it. Perfect streak all week — don't touch it today.[cite: 17]
Nap Cap — 60 min: Hard ceiling. Shift bedtime earlier if it runs over.[cite: 17]
Dhuhr / Asr / Maghrib / Isha: Normal schedule. Each one a genuine break.[cite: 17]

top_mits.name: Finish & Fully Test the Automation[cite: 17]
top_mits.details: 10-minute hard cap on any setup, planning, or folder work. Set a visible timer before opening anything. Goal: the workflow runs end-to-end with no manual intervention at any step.[cite: 17]

top_mits.name: Send a Fresh Outreach Batch of 10[cite: 17]
top_mits.details: First: confirm the 3 remaining messages from Day 5 are actually sent. Continue to a full fresh 10 — new leads, one personalized line each. Target for today: 13 total sent this week.[cite: 17]

top_mits.name: Record a 90-Second Demo of the Working Automation[cite: 17]
top_mits.details: Screen-record the automation actually running, start to finish. No editing needed. Save it somewhere you'll actually find again.[cite: 17]

admin_and_skipped: Light brand/content thinking — if energy allows in the evening.[cite: 17]
Do not touch the cosmetics/wholesaler decision today. (Day #9 task)[cite: 17]
Do not open the business bank account or calculate the survival number today. (Day #9 task)[cite: 17]
trigger_rules: IF Any task labeled setup, planning, or folder structure appears in the first block THEN 10-minute visible timer. When it rings, close it and open Make.com directly.[cite: 17]
IF Outreach count is anything other than 0 or 10 THEN Remaining messages are the very first task of the block.[cite: 17]
evening_checklist: Log automation status: done / not done, and today's actual outreach total sent.[cite: 17]
One sentence: how did the 10-minute setup cap actually feel to enforce?[cite: 17]
Write Day #9 (Sunday)'s MIT list in advance — bank account, survival number, cosmetics Pursue/Park/Drop decision.[cite: 17]
If the nap ran past 60 minutes today, note it and move tonight's bedtime 20–30 minutes earlier.[cite: 17]

action_plan.title: Day #9 Implementation Playbook — Sunday, July 12, 2026[cite: 18]
action_plan.overview: Exactly How to Do It: Every task from today's plan, broken into the literal clicks, fields, and words to use.[cite: 18]

top_mits.name: MIT 1 — Pick the Project, Plan, Build, Test, Document[cite: 18]
top_mits.details: Extend Jul 4 demo to 'AI Lead Response + Tracking System v2'.[cite: 18] Add exactly two things: Google Sheet log and basic error fallback.[cite: 18] Build module-by-module in Make (5 modules total: Google Sheets Watch Rows, Gemini Request, Gmail Send, Google Sheets Add Row, Error Handler).[cite: 18] Test with real test form entry, verify outputs, document, and turn scheduling ON.[cite: 18]

top_mits.name: MIT 2 — Find Leads, Message Scripts, Send & Log[cite: 18]
top_mits.details: Send the 3 old messages first, then find 5–8 fresh leads using free LinkedIn search.[cite: 18] Use the exact message anatomy: specific observation → bridge → tiny ask → zero-pressure close.[cite: 18] Log every message the moment it is sent in a tracking sheet.[cite: 18]

top_mits.name: MIT 3 — Business Bank Account, Survival Number, Cosmetics Decision[cite: 18]
top_mits.details: Open a non-interest-bearing business bank account (e.g., Islamic banking window).[cite: 18] Calculate real Stage-1 survival number (excluding Zakat).[cite: 18] Answer questions on paper and make a definitive Pursue/Park/Drop decision regarding the cosmetics/wholesaler venture.[cite: 18]

secondary_tasks: Record a 90-second demo of the working automation.[cite: 18]
Health check-in: if not fully recovered, cut fresh outreach batch and protect rest.[cite: 18]
One consolidated journal entry this evening, written once.[cite: 18]
boundaries: The automation build stops at the 5 modules listed (no Slack notifications, second AI models, etc. today).[cite: 18]
Outreach today is capped at the 3 old + up to 8 new.[cite: 18]
Any setup, folder, or planning sub-task inside MIT 1 gets a hard 10-minute timer.[cite: 18]
If you're still not well, MIT 3 (financial + decision) takes priority over MIT 1 and MIT 2.[cite: 18]
